category_sources: source_facts.description says dynamic analysis tools for memory, debugging, and profiling; valgrind.org About describes debugging and profiling tools.
display_name_sources: valgrind.org consistently uses the project name Valgrind.
docs_sources: valgrind.org/docs/manual is the official Valgrind documentation tree and download manual page.
repo_sources: valgrind.org Source Code Repository page says the actively developed current code is in the sourceware.org git repository and gives this clone URL.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and valgrind.org About describe memory debugging, threading bug detection, and profiling for compiled programs.
